title: Sealapack Heavy Duty, Drawstring Handle Green Garden Sacks, Pack Of 10
features: HEAVY DUTY: Sealapack Garden Sacks are perfect for clearing your garden waste. Made from a strong, leak-resistant material with convenient pull drawstring to close and carry the bag.
NEATLY TIED UP: Get your garden waste all tied-up neatly for easy disposal, dead head flowers, add fallen autumn leaves, weeds, hedge or lawn clippings

ALL SEASONS: Autumn leaf clear up, winter tidy ups, shrub and headge maintenance in spring and lawn cuttings in summer, keep your garden looking its best as the seasons change tidying everything away in these large garden sacks
LARGE CAPACITY: Keep your garden waste effortlessly tidied away in these large green garden sacks
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: ROLL OF 12 SACKS
